verbatim_text: Okay so a useful mathematical abstraction for this is something called a partially observed Markov decision process or a POMDP. So you have the states you have the inputs and outputs and then you have these coherence and update ability arrows in between them. So this is the framework I'm going to be using throughout this talk as an abstraction for world user and self models. And also you might notice it has a lot in common with the structured models from previous eras. This is like a particular instance of a probabilistic model.
